title: Starboundcraft
body:
![A logo image combining the logo from the game Starbound with the one from the game Minecraft, making the two logos spell out Starboundcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c085fca7d8d213302348705e515111ff52a17c49.png)

Explore a vast universe with strange biomes inhabited by terrifying creatures....all from the comfort of the overworld! Starbound finally comes to Minecraft! Come, see what the vast cosmos have to offer-without exploring the cosmos!



-(Side note: This is Baby's First Mod & I am learning the ropes of how to mod as I go, please be rest assured that any issues will be fixed as I continue to work on this mod-issues like the worldgen for the biomes will get fixed to being less frequent eventually whenever I get the hang of that!)
